body:
## Summary
- Fix 4 `@typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars` errors in CI
- Remove unused `shuffle` param from `resetRoundSkills`, update test callers
- Remove unused test variables in deck.test.ts and hand.test.ts
- Update `GameLogic_backend.md` to reflect TS migration progress
- Update `card-abstractions.md` file paths from `.js` to `.ts`

## Test plan
- [x] `npm run lint` — zero errors
- [x] `npm run test:unit` — 134/134 passing
title: fix(lint): resolve all unused vars and update docs for TS
